text: 🇮🇷 Spokesperson of the Iranian Army: Amir Hatami ordered that in the event of a ground invasion of the country, not a single invader should be left alive. Brigadier General Akraminia said in a televised interview that he must especially remember the martyrs who were killed in the operation to counter American infiltration in southern Isfahan. We lost four martyrs there; Second Brigadier General Masoud Zare, a professor and commander of the Army Ground Force Air Defense Faculty, bravely entered that operation. The order also came from the Commander-in-Chief of the Islamic Republic of Iran Army that if a ground invasion of the country occurs, it must be dealt with seriously, and he emphasized that not a single invader should be left alive.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗军队发言人：阿米尔·哈塔米下令，如果发生针对该国的地面入侵，绝不能让任何一名入侵者活着离开。阿克拉米尼亚准将在电视采访中表示，他必须特别铭记在反击美国渗透伊朗南部伊斯法罕的行动中牺牲的烈士。我们在那里失去了四位烈士；陆军地面部队防空学院教授兼指挥官马苏德·扎雷准将勇敢地参加了那次行动。伊朗伊斯兰共和国军队总司令也下达了命令，如果发生针对该国的地面入侵，必须严肃对待，并强调绝不能让任何一名入侵者活着离开。

text: NEW: Türkiye announces it will increase its number of commando brigades. New brigades will be structured differently from existing ones, designed to better match current threats and modern operational concepts. Earlier reports speculate on targets like adding 15 new brigades.
text_zh: 最新消息：土耳其宣布将增加其突击旅的数量。新组建的旅将采用与现有旅不同的结构，旨在更好地适应当前的威胁和现代作战概念。早先的报道推测目标包括增加15个新旅。

text: BREAKING: The U.S. appears to have ended its military presence in Syria with the last convoy leaving the Qasrak base in the northeast. Control of the area is now shifting to Syrian forces. This effectively ends the U.S. ground presence that began in 2014.
text_zh: 突发：美国似乎已结束其在叙利亚的军事存在，最后一支车队已离开位于东北部的卡斯拉克（Qasrak）基地。该地区的控制权现正移交给叙利亚军队。这实际上结束了自2014年开始的美国地面存在。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Pakistani Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir is reportedly set to visit Washington tomorrow following a trip to Iran, as part of regional mediation efforts, a Pakistani security source told Al Jazeera.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 据半岛电视台援引巴基斯坦安全消息人士的话报道，巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅在访问伊朗后，据称将于明天访问华盛顿，作为地区调解努力的一部分。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Pakistani Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir met with Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf in Tehran on Thursday.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅周四在德黑兰会见了伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Genocide in Lebanon! Israeli warplanes strike Al-Qasmiyeh Bridge, southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩发生种族灭绝！以色列战机袭击了黎巴嫩南部的卡斯米耶（Al-Qasmiyeh）大桥。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 GRAPHIC: One person was killed in a targeted Israeli airstrike on the Dahr al-Baidar road linking Beirut and Damascus. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 画面：在连接贝鲁特和大马士革的达尔·拜达尔（Dahr al-Baidar）公路上，以色列的一次定点空袭造成一人死亡。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Russian FM Lavrov to the U.S.: "No country has ever refused dialogue with the U.S." urging Washington to engage governments it dislikes through diplomacy first. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044722987790659996/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：俄罗斯外长拉夫罗夫对美国表示：“没有哪个国家拒绝与美国对话”，敦促华盛顿首先通过外交手段与它不喜欢的政府接触。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044722987790659996/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 ISRAEL pushes for a buffer zone and full operational freedom under any Lebanon ceasefire deal - WSJ tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：最新消息 🔴 以色列在任何黎巴嫩停火协议下都推动建立缓冲区并要求完全的行动自由 - 《华尔街日报》推文

text: Open Source Intel An IDF strike on Nabatieh, Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044722325665317053/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军对黎巴嫩纳巴泰（Nabatieh）的袭击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044722325665317053/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Givati Brigade troops operating in Bint Jbeil located more than 130 Hezbollah weapons inside a school, including Kalashnikovs, pistols, and other firearms. The weapons were confiscated as forces continue targeted operations to dismantle Hezbollah infrastructure. The IDF says Hezbollah uses civilian sites to carry out attacks against Israeli civilians and troops. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军：吉瓦提旅（Givati Brigade）部队在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）行动时，在一所学校内发现了130多件真主党武器，包括卡拉什尼科夫冲锋枪、手枪和其他枪支。随着部队继续进行旨在拆除真主党基础设施的定点行动，这些武器已被没收。以色列国防军称，真主党利用民用场所对以色列平民和军队发动袭击。推文

text: Open Source Intel REUTERS CLAIMS: Analysts say Iran could sustain a halt in oil exports for up to two months before being forced to cut production. BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：路透社声称：分析人士表示，伊朗在被迫减产之前，可以维持石油出口中断长达两个月。突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁范围扩大至全球。伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌走私的船只现在可以在任何地方被美军登船并扣押，此举旨在针对伊朗超过570艘油轮的“影子船队”。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权适用于全球 • 与伊朗或制裁有关的悬挂中立国旗帜的船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：美国海军中央司令部 / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime（Marcus Hand），2026年4月16日；m - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Syrian army forces entered the Qasrak base in northern Hasakah following the withdrawal of U.S. troops. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044721365991706677/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：在美军撤离后，叙利亚军队进入了哈塞克（Hasakah）北部的卡斯拉克（Qasrak）基地。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044721365991706677/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A senior Lebanese security official told Reuters that an Israeli strike has severed the last bridge connecting southern Lebanon to the rest of the country. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位黎巴嫩高级安全官员告诉路透社，以色列的一次袭击切断了连接黎巴嫩南部与该国其他地区的最后一道桥梁。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Macron launches and attends the "No-Screens Day" initiative with French pupils. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044720280698818973/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 马克龙发起并参加了与法国学生的“无屏幕日”倡议。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044720280698818973/video/1 推文

text_zh: 开源情报：美国联邦航空管理局（FAA）正在调查一起事件，此前有两名飞行员在紧急航空频率上发出猫叫声和狗叫声。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044719330156265559/video/1 推文

text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩马纳拉（Manara）附近的一个村庄俯瞰的山顶上竖起以色列国旗。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044718333077942327/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. Treasury sanctioned an oil smuggling network run by Mohammad Hossein Shamkhani, son of the now-deceased senior Iranian security official Ali Shamkhani. Treasury also sanctioned targets tied to a Hizballah gold scheme that ultimately benefits Iran's military. Both actions fall under Operation Economic Fury. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国财政部制裁了一个由已故伊朗高级安全官员阿里·沙姆哈尼（Ali Shamkhani）之子穆罕默德·侯赛因·沙姆哈尼（Mohammad Hossein Shamkhani）运营的石油走私网络。财政部还制裁了与真主党黄金计划有关的目标，该计划最终使伊朗军方受益。这两项行动均属于“经济愤怒行动”（Operation Economic Fury）。推文

text: Open Source Intel This a whole new level of choking the regime. Iranian shadow tankers are now being targeted. Wondering how this affects the negotiations. BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：这是扼杀该政权的一个全新水平。伊朗的影子油轮现在成为目标。想知道这如何影响谈判。突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁范围扩大至全球。伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌走私的船只现在可以在任何地方被美军登船并扣押，此举旨在针对伊朗超过570艘油轮的“影子船队”。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权适用于全球 • 与伊朗或制裁有关的悬挂中立国旗帜的船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：美国海军中央司令部 / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime（Marcus Hand），2026年4月16日；m - 开源情报推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Marines conduct live hoist training on the flight deck of America-class amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA 7). Tripoli and its 3,500 Sailors and embarked Marines are executing the mission to blockade ships entering and departing Iranian ports. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044716931890967033/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：美国海军陆战队在“美国”级两栖攻击舰“的黎波里”号（USS Tripoli, LHA 7）的飞行甲板上进行实地吊装训练。“的黎波里”号及其3500名水手和随舰海军陆战队员正在执行封锁进出伊朗港口船只的任务。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044716931890967033/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Based on the volume of jets overhead in northern Israel today, there appears to be a major air campaign underway over Lebanon. Hezbollah is definitely getting hit very hard. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：根据今天以色列北部上空喷气式飞机的数量，黎巴嫩上空似乎正在进行一场大规模的空中战役。真主党肯定受到了非常沉重的打击。推文

text: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian has emphasized China's support for Iran's sovereignty, security, and legal rights in the Strait of Hormuz, urging that they be respected and protected as a critical window for peace opens in the region.
text_zh: 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 中国外交部发言人林剑强调了中国对伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的主权、安全和合法权利的支持，敦促在地区和平的关键窗口期，这些权利应得到尊重和保护。

text: Open Source Intel IRGC General Esmail Kowsari says Iran could reroute oil exports through Russia if blocked in the Strait of Hormuz, pointing to how Moscow used Iranian channels during the Ukraine war. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044715915728617613/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）将军伊斯梅尔·科萨里（Esmail Kowsari）表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡被封锁，伊朗可以通过俄罗斯转运石油出口，并指出莫斯科在乌克兰战争期间是如何利用伊朗渠道的。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044715915728617613/video/1 推文

text: Pro-Israel megadonor Miriam Adelson donated $40 million to Republican super PACs to help the party maintain control of Congress. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 亲以色列的大额捐款人米里亚姆·阿德尔森（Miriam Adelson）向共和党超级政治行动委员会捐赠了4000万美元，以帮助该党保持对国会的控制。来源：彭博社

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced that troops located more than 130 weapons inside a school in southern Lebanon during operations in the Bint Jbeil area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，部队在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）地区的行动中，在黎巴嫩南部的一所学校内发现了130多件武器。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 So... Pete Hegseth uses a fake Bible verse from "Pulp Fiction" for a prayer during a Pentagon meeting. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 所以……皮特·海格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）在五角大楼的一次会议上，竟然引用了电影《低俗小说》中的伪造圣经经文来进行祈祷。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Pete Hegseth quoted a fake Bible verse from Pulp Fiction during a Pentagon sermon.
text_zh: 皮特·海格塞斯在五角大楼的布道中引用了《低俗小说》里的伪造圣经经文。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Heavy Israeli airstrikes targeted the industrial zone in Nabatieh city, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage showcasing the moment Israeli airstrikes targeted Nabatieh city, aswell as a image showcasing Israeli airstrikes targeting Kfar Hatta located in Sidons countryside. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列对黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰市的工业区进行了猛烈空袭。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 视频展示了以色列空袭纳巴泰市的瞬间，以及一张展示以色列空袭西顿乡村地区卡法哈塔（Kfar Hatta）的照片。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾🇸🇾💲 The Syrian dollar hit a 13,700 L.S per dollar exchange rate. The average Syrian to Dollar exchange rate during the rule of the former Syrian Government under sanctions was 14,000 L.S @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇸🇾 The head of the Damascus Lawyers Association branch, Muhammad Suleiman Dahla, describes those who will participate in the April 17th protests as "remnants". (As in former regime supporters) The demonstration is against high living expenses and the lack of safety across Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾🇸🇾💲 叙利亚镑对美元汇率跌至1美元兑13,700叙利亚镑。在前叙利亚政府受制裁期间，叙利亚镑对美元的平均汇率曾达到14,000叙利亚镑。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 大马士革律师协会分会负责人穆罕默德·苏莱曼·达拉（Muhammad Suleiman Dahla）将参加4月17日抗议活动的人称为“残余势力”（指前政权支持者）。此次示威活动旨在抗议叙利亚各地的高昂生活成本和安全匮乏问题。 @wfwitness

text: Türkiye will host talks this week on regional security cooperation with Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, and possibly Egypt. The meeting, involving foreign ministers including Hakan Fidan, will take place during the Antalya Diplomacy Forum. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 土耳其本周将与巴基斯坦、沙特阿拉伯以及可能的埃及举行关于区域安全合作的会谈。此次会议将在安塔利亚外交论坛期间举行，包括哈坎·菲丹（Hakan Fidan）在内的外交部长将出席。来源：彭博社

text: 🇪🇸 🇻🇪 Spanish energy group Repsol said on Thursday it has reached an agreement with the Venezuelan government to regain control of its oil business in the country and sharply increase production over the coming years.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇻🇪 西班牙能源集团雷普索尔（Repsol）周四表示，已与委内瑞拉政府达成协议，将重新获得其在该国石油业务的控制权，并计划在未来几年大幅提高产量。

text: Britain may face food shortages this summer if the Iran war continues. Officials warn that disruption in the Strait of Hormuz could reduce carbon dioxide (CO₂) supplies, which are essential for food production, packaging, and drink manufacturing. This could lead to shortages of items like chicken, pork, and fizzy drinks, though not a complete lack of food—mainly reduced variety in shops. Source: The Times
text_zh: 如果伊朗战争持续，英国今年夏天可能会面临食品短缺。官员警告称，霍尔木兹海峡的混乱可能会减少二氧化碳（CO₂）的供应，而二氧化碳对于食品生产、包装和饮料制造至关重要。这可能导致鸡肉、猪肉和碳酸饮料等商品短缺，虽然不至于完全断供，但商店里的商品种类将大幅减少。来源：《泰晤士报》

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Pentagon have held preliminary talks with major U.S. manufacturers like General Motors, Ford Motor, GE Aerospace, and Oshkosh Corporation to shift some commercial production toward munitions, missiles, military vehicles, and other defense supplies. Translation: The Pentagon is so low on munitions after messing with Iran that they’re now begging Ford and GM to turn their car factories into missile plants.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 五角大楼已与通用汽车、福特汽车、通用电气航空和奥什科什公司（Oshkosh Corporation）等美国主要制造商进行了初步会谈，旨在将部分商业生产转向弹药、导弹、军用车辆和其他国防物资。解读：五角大楼在与伊朗发生冲突后弹药储备严重不足，现在正恳求福特和通用汽车将汽车工厂改造成导弹工厂。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 IDF said that Hezbollah fired a ballistic missile from Lebanon at the southern Haifa Bay area overnight. No sirens sounded in any towns as the missile hit an open area, according to the IDF. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军（IDF）表示，真主党昨晚从黎巴嫩向海法湾南部地区发射了一枚弹道导弹。据以色列国防军称，由于导弹击中了开阔地带，所有城镇均未拉响警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The demolition of the Lebanese village of Meiss El Jabal on the Israeli border near the kibbutz of Menara in northern Israel is under way by the IDF. An Israeli flag has been raised on the village hills, not far from Menara. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军正在拆除位于以色列北部梅纳拉基布兹附近、以色列边境上的黎巴嫩村庄梅斯埃尔贾巴尔（Meiss El Jabal）。一面以色列国旗已在距离梅纳拉不远的村庄山丘上升起。 @wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Zelensky requests support for the launch of the "Tribunal for Russia's Aggression against Ukraine," to hold "Russian war criminals" legally accountable: "This is necessary, just as it was necessary after the Second World War." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044714933875625997/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 泽连斯基请求支持启动“俄罗斯侵略乌克兰法庭”，以追究“俄罗斯战争罪犯”的法律责任：“这很有必要，就像二战后有必要这样做一样。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044714933875625997/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF eliminated a Hamas communications unit commander in Gaza City and two production unit operatives in separate strikes this week. Ahmed Abu Khachira was killed for advancing terror operations against IDF forces. Islam Kenita and Mahmoud Hamduna were killed for restoring Hamas military capabilities during the ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 本周，以色列国防军在加沙城的不同空袭中消灭了一名哈马斯通信部队指挥官和两名生产部队人员。艾哈迈德·阿布·哈奇拉（Ahmed Abu Khachira）因推进针对以色列国防军的恐怖行动而被击毙。伊斯兰·凯尼塔（Islam Kenita）和马哈茂德·哈姆杜纳（Mahmoud Hamduna）因在停火期间恢复哈马斯军事能力而被击毙。推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁范围扩大至全球。美国军队现在可以在任何地方登船并扣押伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌运载违禁品的船只，此举旨在针对伊朗由570多艘油轮组成的“影子船队”。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权适用于全球 • 与伊朗有关或受制裁的悬挂中立国旗帜的船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：美国海军中央司令部 / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand)，2026年4月16日；m 推文

text: Open Source Intel An official Lebanese source told Nidaa Al-Watan that any ceasefire will be conditional and the result of negotiations in Washington. U.S. preparations continue for another meeting between Lebanon and Israel, which could take place in Washington. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 一位黎巴嫩官方消息人士告诉《Nidaa Al-Watan》，任何停火都将是有条件的，并且是华盛顿谈判的结果。美国正在为黎巴嫩和以色列之间的另一次会议做准备，会议可能在华盛顿举行。推文

text: Open Source Intel Reports say the USS Gerald R. Ford has reached 295 days at sea, marking the longest U.S. carrier deployment since the Cold War after a mission spanning the Caribbean, Red Sea and eastern Mediterranean. Originally deployed from Naval Station Norfolk in June 2025, the carrier was reportedly extended multiple times, supported operations tied to Venezuela and Iran, and underwent repairs in Greece after an onboard fire. The ship is now said to be closing in on the longest carrier deployment since 1964. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 报道称，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（USS Gerald R. Ford）在海上航行时间已达295天，这是自冷战以来美国航母部署时间最长的一次，任务跨越加勒比海、红海和东地中海。据报道，该航母最初于2025年6月从诺福克海军基地部署，后多次延长部署时间，支持了与委内瑞拉和伊朗相关的行动，并在发生火灾后在希腊进行了维修。据称，该舰目前正接近自1964年以来最长的航母部署记录。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Zelensky receives the International Four Freedoms Award, named after U.S. President Roosevelt's 1941 speech outlining four fundamental human rights, presented by Dutch PM Rob Jetten, at a ceremony in Middelburg, Netherlands. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044710932748587458/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 泽连斯基在荷兰米德尔堡举行的仪式上，从荷兰首相罗布·杰滕（Rob Jetten）手中接过“国际四项自由奖”。该奖项以美国总统罗斯福1941年概述四项基本人权的演讲命名。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044710932748587458/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🛢️ Russia’s oil refining output dropped by 16% to 4.72 million barrels per day between April 2 and 8, following Ukrainian drone strikes on refining infrastructure, according to Bloomberg. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044710156785635485/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🛢️ 据彭博社报道，继乌克兰对炼油基础设施发动无人机袭击后，4月2日至8日期间，俄罗斯炼油产量下降了16%，至每天472万桶。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044710156785635485/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Satellite imagery shows oil tanks on fire on Sirri Island, Iran. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044709401601139035/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 卫星图像显示伊朗西里岛（Sirri Island）上的储油罐起火。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044709401601139035/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The U.S. Senate rejected efforts to halt arms sales to Israel. ▪️ More than 30 Democrats supported the move to block the sales, but the measures ultimately failed due to Republican opposition. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044708442930139353/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 美国参议院否决了停止向以色列出售武器的努力。 ▪️ 超过30名民主党人支持阻止出售的动议，但由于共和党的反对，该措施最终失败。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044708442930139353/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli warplanes struck the Qasimiyeh bridge in southern Lebanon with multiple airstrikes. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044708402715140264/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 以色列战机对黎巴嫩南部的卡西米耶（Qasimiyeh）大桥进行了多次空袭。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044708402715140264/video/1 推文

text: Pakistan’s Army Chief, Asim Munir, met with Iran’s Parliament Speaker, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）会见了伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 💲 The Syrian dollar has to hit a 13,700 L.S per dollar exchange rate. The average Syrian to Dollar exchange rate during the rule of the former Syrian Government under sanctions was 14,000 L.S @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 💲 叙利亚镑兑美元汇率已达到13,700叙利亚镑兑1美元。在前叙利亚政府受制裁统治期间，叙利亚镑兑美元的平均汇率为14,000叙利亚镑。 @wfwitness
